title: Motivation: Morning Routine
hook: The day I realized morning routine was different

main_content.script: I'll be honest - I struggled with this for years...
Then I learned this one thing that changed everything...
Your future self will thank you for starting now.

notes: Platform notes: Hook in first 3 seconds, loop-friendly ending preferred
